message:
test: add E2E tests for audit command

Adds 15 comprehensive E2E tests covering:
- Trauma mode (--trauma): scanning for dangerous patterns
- Audit mode: LLM-based rule violation detection
- JSON output format for both modes
- Error handling (invalid days, no sessions, null timeline)
- Severity classification (proven→high, candidate→medium)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
